## Summary

- Explain the user-facing or maintainer-facing change.
- Link the issue if there is one.

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `pytest`
- [ ] I did not add or expose any API keys, credentials, or secret paths
- [ ] I kept MCP tools task-oriented rather than exposing raw API endpoints
- [ ] I preserved the public `krpoltext` / private live-NEC booklet boundary
- [ ] I documented behavior changes in `README.md` or `docs/` when needed
